signals.message:
Monthly reminder: Check traffic challans on your car for the month of June

Hey SHOBANA KUMARI P, this is a routine reminder to check if any traffic challans have been issued on your car.

Checking periodically can help avoid issues with traffic police during routine traffic checks.

Tap on “Check now” to run a detailed check and find out if your car has challans issued in Parivahan or state RTOs.
